summary: The chapter opens with a character named Te3iaev reflecting on hiding their strength, followed by Nayoon confronting the protagonist about their sword practice, mentioning her recent encounter with Hajin. The protagonist then logs into a popular virtual reality game, "Gladiator of the Century," under the username "EXTRA." There, they are repeatedly challenged and swiftly defeated by a surprisingly skilled and persistent opponent, "Chae Nayool," who is implied to be Nayoon. Despite the consistent losses, the protagonist agrees to duel Chae Nayool every time they meet.
key_moments: Nayoon questions the protagonist's sword practice and mentions having met Hajin.
The protagonist logs into the virtual game "Gladiator of the Century" as their avatar "EXTRA."
The protagonist (EXTRA) is repeatedly and instantly defeated by Chae Nayool in multiple duels.
The protagonist agrees to fight the persistent Chae Nayool every time they encounter her in the game.
